label: TRI
description: Terrain Ruggedness Index; Mean elevation difference between a focal cell and its neighbors

label: TPI
description: Topographic Position Index; Elevation of a focal cell relative to the mean of its neighbors

label: TWI
description: Topographic Wetness Index; Steady-state wetness from upslope contributing area and local slope

label: Slope
note: Excluded in screening: high collinearity with TRI

label: Northness
description: North-south component of aspect (-1 indicates south and 1 indicates north)
derivation: cos(aspect); aspect derived from DEM (Beers et al. 1966)

label: Eastness
description: East-west component of aspect (-1 indicates west and 1 indicates east)
derivation: sin(aspect); aspect derived from DEM (Beers et al. 1966)

label: Canopy Cover
description: Proportion of ground covered by canopy returns
derivation: LiDAR360 forestry metrics on normalized point cloud

label: Gap Fraction
description: Proportion of sky not obscured by canopy (complement of canopy cover)
derivation: LiDAR360 forestry metrics on normalized point cloud
note: Excluded in screening: perfect inverse dependence with canopy_cover (r = -1.0)

label: Leaf Area Index
description: One-sided leaf area per unit ground surface area
derivation: LiDAR360 forestry metrics on normalized point cloud

label: Understory Density
description: Relative point density in the lowest 0-3 m stratum
derivation: Vertical stratification of normalized point cloud (lowest of ten ~3-m strata)

label: Distance to Deck Roads
description: Euclidean distance to elevated deck-road infrastructure

label: Distance to Hiking Trails
description: Euclidean distance to ground-level hiking trails
